system_name: Substation Automation Network - Regional Grid Operator

assets.name: None - cleartext Modbus TCP
assets.notes: Legacy protocol, no cryptographic layer at all - flagged for the sector module.

assets.name: AES-128-CBC
assets.location: DNP3 Secure Authentication v5 payload encryption, substation gateway
assets.notes: Wraps DNP3 SAv5 challenge-response payloads between the gateway and the control centre.

assets.name: ECDSA-P256
assets.location: PLC firmware update signature verification, real-time control loop
assets.notes: Root-of-trust for PLC firmware; verification happens during a bounded maintenance window, not the control loop itself, but the PLC's crypto library is shared with in-loop operations.

assets.name: RSA-2048
assets.location: Process control HMI remote access VPN, control centre gateway
assets.notes: Standard IT-side VPN gateway, not embedded in the real-time control loop - easier migration path than SS-01 to SS-03.
